news.headline: Canadian Banc Corp. declares $0.14975 monthly dividend for Class A shares and $0.05583 for Preferred shares. Payable March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Canadian Banc Corp. announced its monthly distribution for shareholders. Each Class A share will receive $0.14975, while each Preferred share will receive $0.05583. The distributions will be payable on March 10, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Venmo users can now buy crypto on Exodus using MoonPay, benefiting over 60 million users.
news.summary: More than 60 million Venmo account holders are now able to buy cryptocurrency directly through Exodus thanks to MoonPay. This partnership allows Venmo users to access the world of digital currency quickly and easily through the Exodus platform.

news.headline: Dave has transitioned to a simplified fee structure from optional "Tips" pricing model for all members.
news.summary: Transition complete: Company switches from optional "Tips" pricing model to mandatory pricing system for all members. The change impacts all users, eliminating the previous flexible tipping model.

news.headline: Income Financial Trust declares monthly distribution of $0.07408 per unit, payable on March 10, 2025 to unit holders on record as of Feb 28, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Income Financial Trust announced a monthly distribution of $0.07408 per unit. This distribution will be paid out on March 10, 2025, to unit holders who are recorded as such by February 28, 2025.

news.headline: North American Financial 15 Split Corp declares $0.11335 monthly distribution for Class A and $0.07292 for Preferred share.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 20, 2025, North American Financial 15 Split Corp. announced its monthly dividends. Shareholders holding Class A shares will receive $0.11335 per share monthly ($1.3602 annually) while Preferred shareholders will receive $0.07292 per share monthly ($0.875 annually). The dividends will be paid on March 10, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Financial 15 Split Corp. declares $0.12570 per Class A share and $0.07083 per Preferred share, payable on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Financial 15 Split Corp. ("Financial 15") announced its monthly distribution amounts. Each Class A share will receive $0.12570 per share monthly ($1.51 per share annually), while each Preferred share will receive $0.07083 per share monthly ($0.850 annually). Shareholders as of February 28, 2025, will be eligible for these distributions, which will be paid out on March 10, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development, Data and AI-driven solutions have been acknowledged for their outstanding performance within the European private equity sector. These innovative solutions have garnered recognition for their excellence among service providers in this market. This recognition highlights the impactful role of data and AI technologies, showcasing their relevance and effectiveness in the sector. Such solutions are proving to be instrumental in driving success and efficiency in the European private equity market, emphasizing the growing importance of data-driven strategies. This achievement underscores the increasing adoption and integration of data and AI technologies within the industry, signaling a promising trend for future advancements.

Fenceworks acquires Kansas Fencing, expanding its portfolio. No disclosed terms. Founded in 2003. #portfolioexpansion
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Riverside, California, Fenceworks, a prominent fencing installer and distributor owned by Gemspring Capital, revealed its acquisition of Kansas Fencing, Inc. Established in 2003, Kansas Fencing is now under the ownership of Fenceworks. The specific financial details of the acquisition were not made public.

news.headline: JackRabbit Mobility partners with NASCAR driver J.J. Yeley to bring micro eBikes to track for pros, fans, and teams.
news.summary: San Diego - On February 20, 2025, JackRabbit Mobility, a leading figure in the micro ebike sector, revealed their cutting-edge electric pit bike, catering to professional riders, enthusiasts, and event crews. This innovation stands as an ideal transportation solution for NASCAR Cup teams and features specifically designed capabilities for large-scale operations. The collaboration with NASCAR Cup signifies a significant milestone for JackRabbit Mobility as they continue to expand their market presence.

news.headline: Biggest Little® introduces new spring collection with b is for ball® as a solution to bath toy struggles.
news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York on February 20, 2025, Biggest Little® introduced a revolutionary and patented product aimed at resolving parents' challenges with bath toys. The company, renowned for its innovative and child-centered play items, gained popularity with b is for ball®, a contemporary ball set showcased in esteemed museums. This new solution promises to alleviate the struggles faced by parents and enhance the bath-time experience for children.

news.headline: Welltory ranked #31 in Deloitte's SF Bay Area Tech Fast 500, with 70% YoY revenue growth.

Welltory is dedicated to revolutionizing the way individuals handle their well-being...

news.headline: The IRS is expected to fire about 6,000 workers today - CNN.
Global non vascular stent market valued at $1.6B in 2023, projected to reach $2.7B by 2035 at 4.5% CAGR - Allied Market Research.
news.summary: The report by Allied Market Research on the non-vascular stent market reveals that the market was valued at $1.6 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $2.7 billion by 2035, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.5% from 2024 to 2035. The market is segmented by product type (gastrointestinal stents, pulmonary stents, urological stents, and others), material type (metallic stents and non-metallic stents), and end user (hospitals, ambulatory surgical centers, and others). The growth is driven by the rise in minimally invasive surgical procedures and the presence of key players in the industry, although regulatory compliance may pose a challenge. Technological advancements are expected to provide lucrative opportunities during the forecast period. This comprehensive report covers the forecast period from 2024 to 2035, with 4.5% CAGR growth expected, reflecting the increasing demand and advancements in non-vascular stent technologies.

news.headline: Bessent highlights Musk's focus on the goal. #Bloomberg
Dr. Jessica Shepherd appointed as Head of Medical Affairs at Pvolve to enhance women's health mission.
news.summary: Esteemed OB/GYN and longevity specialist has recently partnered with Pvolve to elevate its effective methodology and address the disparity in gender-focused research within women's health. This collaboration comes as Pvolve continues to gain recognition for its evidence-based workout program combining functional strength training and innovative resistance techniques. The renowned specialist's expertise is expected to enhance Pvolve's initiatives, steering it towards further success in promoting women's health. This development signifies a significant step towards closing the existing gap in research pertaining to women's well-being.

news.headline: NYSE pre-market update for February 20th available with market insights before trading begins; Walmart reports earnings. Kristen Scholer delivers update.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) announced a daily pre-market update available directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can access today's NYSE Pre-market update for key market insights before the trading session begins. Kristen Scholer is the designated presenter providing the pre-market update.

news.headline: India's data center market to reach 3.5GW by 2030, with 1.6GW expected by 2025. Database covers 121 existing & 87 upcoming data centers.
news.summary: A database named "India Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This database focuses on analyzing the Indian data center market portfolio and includes information on colocation data centers. It provides detailed analysis on 121 existing data centers and 87 upcoming data centers. The covered locations include Andra Pradesh, Assam, Bihar, Gujarat, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Karnataka, Kerala, and Madhya Pradesh.

news.headline: Investment of over $2.2 billion expected for 7 upcoming data centers in Hong Kong by 2025 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A database on the Hong Kong data center market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It includes an analysis of 53 existing data centers and 13 upcoming data centers. The locations covered in the analysis are Chai Wan, Fanling, Fo Tan, Kwai Chung, Tai Po, Tseung Kwan O, Tsuen Wan, and Tuen Mun. This database provides a detailed overview of the colocation data centers in these areas, offering valuable insights for interested parties.

news.headline: Kazakh daily oil output at a record high of 2.12 mln bpd, despite pipeline damage in Russia - Sources.
Uzbekistan completes first digital substation at Zafarabad 220kV in Jizzakh Province, enhancing power infrastructure.
news.summary: Shanghai Electric has successfully completed the construction of the Zafarabad 220kV Digital Substation located in Jizzakh Province, Uzbekistan. This achievement signifies a notable advancement in the company's efforts to improve power infrastructure and drive digital transformation within the energy industry. The new substation marks a significant milestone in enhancing the region's power capabilities. The project was finalized on February 20, 2025, showcasing Shanghai Electric's dedication to modernizing energy systems.

news.headline: Alibaba: AI could have a significant influence or even replace 50% of global GDP.
TheWell Bioscience partners with REGEMAT 3D for bioink distribution in Europe, enhancing bioprinting solutions.
news.summary: In Monmouth, New Jersey, on February 20, 2025, TheWell Bioscience, a top biotech firm known for its xeno-free biofunctional hydrogels and bioinks, has revealed the non-exclusive distribution agreement for its products with REGEMAT 3D, another prominent biotech company. The deal allows for wider availability of TheWell Bioscience's innovative products, benefiting the industry.

news.headline: Crypto VCs intrigued by AI agents but cautious on investments as AI could boost crypto trading volumes significantly.
news.summary: Paul Veradittakit, the managing partner at Pantera Capital, highlighted the possibility of AI agents significantly boosting crypto trading volumes. He emphasized the potential for a substantial increase in trading activity due to these advanced technological tools.

news.headline: Intermap secures $12 million financing through Bought Deal LIFE Offering and Private Placement.
news.summary: Equity financing totalling [specific number] was recently completed through a combination of a bought deal LIFE offering and a concurrent private placement. The bought deal LIFE offering resulted in [specific number] in funds raised, while the concurrent private placement generated [specific number] in additional capital. This successful financing initiative demonstrates strong support for the company's growth prospects and strategic direction.

news.headline: Star Sleep & Wellness of Dallas relocates to provide comprehensive sleep therapy with multiple specialists. 33.2% of Texans suffer from inadequate sleep - PRNewswire 20/02/2025.
news.summary: A new office in Dallas is providing specialized care from multiple sleep specialists, ensuring tailored treatment for each individual. Reports from America's Health Rankings by the United Health Foundation reveal that approximately 33.2% of Texans do not get enough sleep within a 24-hour period. This percentage equates to a considerable number of people facing sleep-related issues in Texas. The Dallas office is aiming to address this concern and provide the necessary assistance to improve the sleep quality of individuals in the area.

news.headline: ideaForge invests in Vantage Robotics, enhancing global presence in drone technology. Mumbai and NY, Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, ideaForge Technology Limited, a prominent drone technology company, revealed a significant investment and partnership with Vantage Robotics, Inc., a leading provider of nano and micro UAVs in Silicon Valley. This collaboration aims to leverage the expertise of both companies in advancing drone technology. The partnership is seen as a strategic move that could have a substantial impact on the industry.

news.headline: NYSE hosts its first Partnership Day with top industry leaders, media partners, and creators to launch NYSE Partnership Network.
news.summary: Today marks a significant event as the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) holds its first-ever NYSE Partnership Day on February 20, 2025. The event is gathering prominent media partners, publishers, ad tech leaders, content creators, agencies, and platforms to introduce the NYSE Partnership Network. This collaborative platform aims to foster relationships and drive innovation within the industry.

news.headline: Zing Health partners with Karoo Health to enhance cardiac care delivery, tapping into network of 700+ cardiology providers.
news.summary: In order to strengthen the progress of special needs Medicare Advantage plans, Zing Health has announced a partnership with Karoo to access a segment of their extensive national network comprising over 700 cardiology provider partners. This collaboration signals a significant move for Zing Health, a prominent Medicare Advantage insurer based in Chicago and Albuquerque, N.M. The announcement was made on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Taiwan's data center capacity by 2025 will double, mainly in Taipei, with 22 existing and 4 upcoming data centers.
news.summary: The "Taiwan Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database is now available, offering detailed analysis of Taiwan's data center market. It covers 22 existing data centers and 4 upcoming data centers in locations such as Changhua, Kaohsiung, Taichung, Tainan, Taipei, Taoyuan, and Zhubei. This database provides comprehensive information on colocation data centers, including upcoming white-floor space.

news.headline: HWH International Inc. to undergo 1-for-5 reverse stock split on Feb. 24, 2025, trading under symbol "HWH" after the split.
news.summary: Bethesda-based HWHO International Inc. (NASDAQ: HWH), a purpose-driven lifestyle company, shared news today of a 1-for-5 reverse stock split of its common stock. This move is set to take effect at 9:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on February 24, 2025. Following the split, the Company's common stock will be traded on a split-adjusted basis starting the same day under the existing symbol "HWH."

news.headline: Industry leaders defend safety of synthetic turf amid concerns of PFAS hazards, emphasizing its minimal risks - a year of controversy.
news.summary: In the last year, there has been increasing attention on the safety of artificial turf, with numerous reports raising worries about potential dangers. Many of these reports focus on the risks associated with PFAS (per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) and underline the possible harm these chemicals could pose to individuals and communities.

news.headline: xpath.global expands global mobility services with in-house compliance team for corporate employee mobility in 183 countries.
news.summary: In an effort to streamline corporate employee mobility worldwide, Xpath.global has established an internal compliance team. This team will oversee operations in 183 countries, providing a range of services including immigration assistance, tax compliance, labor law adherence, social security coordination, and relocation support. The initiative was launched in Bucharest, Romania on Feb. 20, 2025 by xpath.global.

news.headline: GeBBS Healthcare named leader in 2025 IAOP Global 100 Outsourcing List for Revenue Cycle Management.
news.summary: GeBBS Healthcare Solutions, Inc., a prominent company in Revenue Cycle Management and Risk Adjustment Solutions for Healthcare Providers and Payers and part of the EQT portfolio, has been recognized on The 2025 Global Outsourcing 100® list in the Leader category. This acknowledgment highlights GeBBS Healthcare Solutions' standing as a top provider in its field.

news.headline: Cindy Cates joins Full Sail Partners as Principal Consultant, bringing Deltek ERP experience. Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Accounting professional Cindy Cates, who is a Certified Public Accountant, has recently joined the consulting team at Full Sail Partners in STEAMBOAT SPRINGS, Colorado. This Deltek Premier Partner announced the news on February 20, 2025, via PRNewswire-PRWeb. Cates brings extensive experience with Deltek ERP to her new role as Principal Consultant at the firm.

news.headline: ProMoves Moving & Storage partners with All Things Media for brand development. Elevating moving experience.
news.summary: In a move to enhance its premium moving services, ProMoves Moving & Storage based in Ridgewood, N.J., has selected All Things Media as its official brand development partner on Feb. 20, 2025. This strategic partnership aims to elevate the white-glove moving experience for customers. This collaboration is set to drive ProMoves towards a new phase of growth and improved service quality, highlighting the company's commitment to providing top-notch services.

news.headline: Stratus Building Solutions of Palm Beach expands Florida presence, adding new territories from Boca Raton to Melbourne.
news.summary: A prominent company known for its modern commercial cleaning and janitorial services, Stratus Building Solutions®, has recently revealed a major expansion plan for its operations in Florida. The announcement was made in West Palm Beach, Florida on February 20, 2025. This move signifies a significant growth in their service areas within the state.

news.headline: AchieveUnite buys Rohner & Associates, offering decades of channel intelligence & AI platform, boosting partner performance.
news.summary: AchieveUnite, a Partnering Success Company based in Alexandria, VA, revealed today their acquisition of a platform integrating AI technology and predictive analytics tools to enhance partner performance. This strategic move aims to provide comprehensive channel intelligence with insights derived from years of experience, catering to partner needs effectively. The announcement made on Feb. 20, 2025, signifies a significant step towards delivering unmatched value to partners across the network.

news.headline: Chicago law firm Salvi, Schostok & Pritchard P.C. expands office in The Loop with an 8,100 sq ft addition, including new press conference room and podcast studio.
news.summary: A recent development in Chicago involves the law firm Salvi, Schostok & Pritchard P.C. expanding their space by 8,100 square feet. This new area will feature a press conference room, podcast studio, and more conference space. The expansion highlights the firm's commitment to enhancing their services and accommodating growing needs.

news.headline: Blueair's air purifier earns asthma & allergy certification, offering more choices for clean indoor air. - 129 characters
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 20, 2025, the Asthma and Allergy Foundation of America (AAFA) and Allergy Standards Limited (ASL) have collaborated to introduce Blueair's Classic Pro CP7i Air Purifier. This partnership aims to offer a broader range of options for individuals looking to enhance indoor air quality. The new designation ensures a variety of products are now available to cater to this need. This update is expected to positively impact the market by providing increased choices for consumers looking to improve their indoor living spaces.

news.headline: National Hip-Hop Museum opens 3 DC dispensaries to raise funds and launches a coffee-infused cannabis product line.
news.summary: A nonprofit organization recently unveiled the opening of three dispensaries located in Washington, DC. Additionally, they announced their intention to introduce a new line of cannabis products infused with coffee. The organization behind this initiative, The National Hip-Hop Museum (NHHM), is seeking to diversify its revenue streams amidst ongoing financial challenges faced by nonprofits. The move comes as part of their strategic plan to broaden their market reach and increase engagement with customers. This development marks a significant expansion for NHHM as they venture into the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Alaska Uncharted offers luxury small ship cruises for travelers in Alaska, bridging the gap between nature and connectivity.
news.summary: Travelers exploring the stunning wilderness of Alaska have long had to decide between fully immersing themselves in nature or staying connected to the outside world. Alaska Uncharted is changing this by providing an exclusive, all-inclusive luxury small ship cruise experience. This will allow visitors to truly experience the adventure offered by Alaska's landscapes.

news.headline: Cin7 adds new executive hiring & promotions for better customer success. Leading cloud-based software provider.
news.summary: Cin7, a prominent provider of AI-powered inventory and order management software, has boosted its executive team to enhance customer support. The company, based in Denver, made this announcement on February 20, 2025. Known for its cloud-based solutions, Cin7 is renowned in the industry and aims to strengthen its dedication to customer success.

news.headline: Sila experiences rapid growth, offering instant payments across RTP, FedNow, ACH. Push-to-Card and Wires to launch in Q2 2025. Join their partnership opportunity! #Fintech #TechNews
news.summary: Sila has introduced its patent-pending ACHNow platform, facilitating immediate payments through RTP, FedNow, and ACH. Push-to-Card and Wire services are set to be added by Q2 2025. The company has also unveiled a new white-label option and is expanding its banking partner network. Forward-thinking banks are encouraged to join this innovative system.

news.headline: 51% of U.S. homeowners not ready for $500 bill, 40% feel worse financially than last year. Pessimism on economy.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted in Tempe, Arizona, it was found that a staggering 51% of homeowners in the United States do not have the necessary funds to cover an unexpected $500 expense. This highlights a concerning trend of financial vulnerability among homeowners. Furthermore, the study showed that 40% of respondents feel that their financial situation has worsened compared to the previous year, indicating widespread pessimism and uncertainty about the economy. These statistics underscore the urgent need for improved financial planning and emergency savings among homeowners in order to navigate unforeseen expenses effectively.

news.headline: Face It Skin introduces 3 new color stick shades for 2025: PLUSH, PETAL, and PETITE for lips and cheeks.
news.summary: In anticipation of the upcoming spring season, Face It Skin, a neurocosmetics brand, has introduced three new vibrant shades to enhance beauty during this time of year. These innovative retractable crayons offer easy application and come in modern hues perfect for the season. The brand, based in HAPPY VALLEY, Ore., made the announcement on Feb. 20, 2025, through PRNewswire-PRWeb. This collection of neurocosmetics-based products aims to enhance the natural beauty of individuals, with each crayon offering a unique and effortless application experience.

news.headline: Wali and EatOkra ally to revolutionize Black-owned restaurant discovery with AI, encompassing 18,000+ restaurants.
news.summary: Wali and EatOkra have joined forces to incorporate AI assistants into more than 18,000 Black-owned restaurants, improving customer interaction with tailored, immediate responses. This partnership equips eateries with cutting-edge AI technology to simplify customer queries, bookings, and more.

news.headline: Dr. Cedric B. Howard releases new book "Unshakeable Leadership" on Feb. 21, drawing from over 30 years of experience.
news.summary: Scheduled for release on February 21st, a new book leverages Dr. Cedric B. Howard's 30+ years of senior administrative expertise to provide a thorough manual on enhancing leadership skills. Positioned as a transformational resource, the publication aims to elevate competent leaders to a higher level of proficiency. Hailing from Seattle, this launch signifies a significant contribution to the executive leadership domain.

news.headline: Oever promotes Peking Opera in NYC through events with UN, Memor Museum, Columbia & NYU, advancing cultural exchange.
news.summary: A California-based cultural organization called Oever recently organized a range of special performances and programs in New York City. The events were organized in partnership with UCT Art Center, Memor Museum, Columbia University, and New York University. The main focus of these events was to showcase and preserve China's intangible cultural heritage, with the aim of raising awareness and appreciation for these traditions.

news.headline: BosleyMD launches Revive+ Serum at Target, enhancing access to hair regrowth solutions. #Target #BosleyMD #Revive+
news.summary: BosleyMD, a renowned figure in hair thinning solutions, has exciting news to share as it launches the Revive+ Hair Densifying Serum at Target. This new scalp care product is set to revolutionize hair care routines with its innovative formula. Customers can now purchase the Revive+ Hair Densifying Serum at their nearest Target store. This expansion of BosleyMD's product line demonstrates the company's commitment to providing effective solutions for hair health. Don't miss your chance to try out this groundbreaking serum, now conveniently available at Target locations nationwide.
